title: Bounded Promise Workers, Origin Fairness, Failure Isolation, and Drain · Compiler Case: Feed Ts Error Isolation

Predict the reader decision, external-unknown boundary, Promise and AbortSignal ownership, PostgreSQL transaction, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
